closed_form_equation_v76.feature_term: K_f_v76 = K_f_v75 + K_f_v75 * R_anti_att * 0.004 + K_f_v75 * B_plastic_v20 * 0.001 + K_f_v75 * D_feature_v14 * 0.001
closed_form_equation_v76.structure_term: K_s_v76 = K_s_v75 + K_s_v75 * (1 - A_struct) * 0.007 + K_s_v75 * B_struct_v20 * 0.004 + K_s_v75 * D_structure_v14 * 0.002
closed_form_equation_v76.learning_term: K_l_v76 = K_l_v75 + K_l_v75 * R_train_v20 + M_anti_att * 1000 + R_anti_att * 1000 + M_brain_direct_v14 * 1000

project_readout.summary: 第七十六版主核开始把传播衰减探针、脑编码第十四版直测链和训练终式第二十桥一起并回主核，使主核开始直接回答系统能否从传播衰减走向补偿。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把这条主核推进到更大的可训练系统里，检验平台期松动是否能够真正被放大而不再衰减。
